description:
## Goal

Build the SQLite concept graph (`guru.db`) with three node types (tradition, concept, chunk) and five edge types (BELONGS_TO, EXPRESSES, PARALLELS, CONTRASTS, DERIVES_FROM). Populate it via three passes: hand-curated bootstrap, LLM-assisted tagging with human review, and cross-tradition edge proposals with human review.

## Pass Architecture

- **Pass A (Bootstrap):** `graph_bootstrap.py` creates the schema and inserts tradition nodes (from `corpus/traditions.toml`), concept nodes (from `concepts/taxonomy.toml`), and chunk nodes with BELONGS_TO edges.
- **Pass B (LLM Tagging):** `tag_concepts.py` scores each chunk against the taxonomy, writing results to `staged_tags`. `review_tags.py` is a CLI for accept/reject/reassign; accepted tags with score ≥ 2 promote to EXPRESSES edges.
- **Pass C (Edge Proposal):** `propose_edges.py` (depends on Stage 4 embeddings) finds high-similarity cross-tradition chunk pairs and asks an LLM to classify them (PARALLELS / CONTRASTS / surface-only / unrelated). `review_edges.py` curates them; accepted edges get tier=verified, unreviewed accepted stay tier=proposed.

## Outputs

- `concepts/taxonomy.toml` — hand-curated starter concept vocabulary
- `data/guru.db` — SQLite graph with live nodes/edges and `staged_*` tables
- All graph mutation scripts under `scripts/`

## Acceptance Criteria

- `guru.db` contains all tradition, concept, and chunk nodes
- Every chunk has at least one BELONGS_TO edge
- LLM tagging produces `staged_tags` rows for every chunk
- After review, the dense cluster (Gnosticism / Hermeticism / Neoplatonism / Kabbalah) has EXPRESSES coverage on ≥80% of chunks
- ≥20 cross-tradition PARALLELS or CONTRASTS edges exist in the live graph after review
- Every edge carries a justification string

## See Also

docs/guru-implementation.md §"Stage 3: Concept Graph Construction"

resolution.note: All 8 subtasks complete: taxonomy.toml (44 concepts), schema.sql, graph_bootstrap.py (168 nodes/120 edges), tag_concepts.py, review_tags.py, propose_edges.py, review_edges.py, backfill_concepts.py, QA pass. guru.db: 132 total edges (120 BELONGS_TO, 10 EXPRESSES, 2 PARALLELS). propose_edges.py and backfill_concepts.py wired to Stage 4 vector_store.py interface.
